spec.name: Chemiclash
spec.summary: Creates a powerful shockwave of chemical energy that intensifies and radiates outward from a marked point, instantly affecting everything within a wide area.
spec.effect_description: Creates a powerful shockwave of chemical energy that intensifies and radiates outward from a marked point, instantly affecting everything within a wide area. A pentagon amplify/affect recipe that channels chemical discipline into shock output. It applies a field pattern against marked across long reach with immediate persistence.
